method.stream_probe: ffprobe with 10-second read timeout and bounded process timeout
method.playback_probe: 5-second FFmpeg decode; a candidate is not accepted without a valid video frame
method.identity_check: sample video frames were checked for channel watermark/identity; interruption pages and wrong logos fail
method.publication_rule: private credential-bearing URLs are never published; token/signed-query URLs are allowed only when directly extracted from a public source catalog with provenance and current playback plus identity verification
method.geo_blocked_fallback_rule: A user-approved VPN/geo-blocked fallback may be published when no better exact candidate passes current playback checks; append (Geo-blocked) to the normal display name and record the access note.
